title: Armed Forces Tribunal Act (Removal of Difficulties) Order 2008
description: Armed Forces Tribunal Act (Removal of Difficulties) Order 2008

(1) 38 seer ar afar a eres ae afar afar(aferngat ar sy frat sm) sree, 2008 2 | (2) ae asta A WER st ante al yaa SPT | 2, Berea ae Bfrenco atte, 2007 (2007 =r 55) al UI 6 Bt St-MT (3) A as (H) A, Ha A oA act ‘ae wee A CAAT a Bes TSN TT | [wr & 7(3)/2008-St (went ea) J: ary frant, Waat aaa 2761 G1/2008 S.R.O. 18(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 40 of the Armed Forces Tribunal Act, 2007 (55 of 2007), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order, namely -— 1. (LD) This Order may be called the Armed Forces Tribunal Act (Removal of Difficulties) Order, 2008. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Armed Forces Tribunal Act, 2007 (55 of 2007), in Section 6, in sub-section (3), in clause (a), for the word “and” occurring at the end, the word “or” shall be substituted. - [F No. 7(32008-D (AFT Cell)} AJAY TIRKEY, Jt.
